title: Test Configuration
description: Master Playwright configuration options to customize test behavior, timeouts, browsers, and more.

sections.title: Configuration File Structure
sections.explanation: This is a comprehensive configuration covering all major settings. Customize based on your needs.

sections.title: Environment-Specific Configuration
sections.explanation: Adapt configuration based on environment. CI often needs different settings than local development.

keyTakeaways: playwright.config.ts is the main configuration file
Set up multiple browser projects for cross-browser testing
Use environment variables for different configurations
Configure reporters for different output formats
Web server config can auto-start your application
